purpose: Example host composition for a small terrain scene with three cloud layers and 1 to 20 drifting cloud descriptors.
rendererAdapterNotes: Map near mattatz-cloud-primitive descriptors to THREE.Cloud-style box volumes.
Map mid descriptors to fewer raymarch steps.
Map far descriptors to impostor cards or a horizon cloud band.
Keep terrain, camera, DOM, and WebGL setup in the host app.
